description:
Pure data extension. No behavior change.

What: Add dst: Option<DstSig> to fz_ir::Cont. Define DstSig { kind: HeapKind, schema_id: Option<u32> }. Add ArgRepr::Dst(HeapKind) variant in ir_codegen. Wire defaults to None / never-emitted.

Why: Foundation. Every downstream ticket consumes one of these fields.

CLIF impact: unchanged.

Removes: nothing.

Tests: existing IR + codegen + interp tests pass; one new test asserts default Cont construction yields dst=None.
title: fz-dps.A: Cont gains optional dst; ArgRepr gains Dst
